directory_structure: .github/ workflows/ deploy-main.yml deploy-main2.yml src/ components/ forms/ ActionButton.jsx ErrorMessage.jsx Label.jsx SubmitButton.jsx shared/ Header.jsx Layout.jsx Loader.jsx ProcessLoader.jsx ProgressStepper.jsx AadhaarOTPVerify.jsx BankAccounts.jsx ChangeLanguage.jsx CkycOTP.jsx CompleteEmandate.jsx EmailOTPVerify.jsx EMILoanDetails.jsx EnterAadhaar.jsx GoogleSignIn.jsx InactivityLogout.jsx Month12LoanRejectModal.jsx PANConfirmation.jsx ProgressiveWebApp.jsx RatingReview.jsx SpecialOfferTimer.jsx UserConsent.jsx VerifyOTP.jsx events/ clevertapEvents.js hooks/ useBackButtonLogout.jsx useDisableLoader.jsx usePageTracking.jsx useStepper.jsx useToast.jsx i18n/ locales/ en.json hi.json ka.json index.js lib/ clevertap.js razorpay.js pages/ AadhaarVerification.jsx AddBankAccount.jsx AutoLogin.jsx CameraPermission.jsx DigilockerVerify.jsx Disbursed.jsx Emandate.jsx EmploymentDetails.jsx Finbox.jsx FinboxError.jsx FinboxStatus.jsx KFS.jsx LoanApproval.jsx LoanRejected.jsx Login.jsx Logout.jsx NotFound.jsx PANVerify.jsx PANVerifyRejected.jsx PennyDrop.jsx SelectTenure.jsx Selfie.jsx SelfieHyperVerge.jsx SelfieHyperVergeResult.jsx Stepper.jsx YourEmail.jsx redux/ slices/ appSlice.js userSlice.js store.js routes/ AppRoutes.jsx ProtectedRoutes.jsx services/ dashboardService.js userService.js styles/ global.css utils/ apiClient.js encryption.js env.js helper.js storage.js validation.js App.jsx index.css main.jsx .cgcignore .gitignore dev.txt eslint.config.js index.html package.json README.md vite.config.js
